session.user: Load and follow the skill instructions in .claude/skills/pr-feedback-classifier/SKILL.md Arguments: --pr 8544 Return the complete JSON output as your final message.
session.assistant: I'll load the skill and execute it with the specified arguments.
session.tool_result:
1→--- 2→name: pr-feedback-classifier 3→description: > 4→ Fetches and classifies PR review feedback with context isolation. 5→ Returns structured JSON with thread IDs for deterministic resolution. 6→ Use when analyzing PR comments before addressing them. 7→argument-hint: "[--pr <number>] [--include-resolved]" 8→context: fork 9→agent: general-purpose 10→model: sonnet 11→--- 12→ 13→# PR Feedback Classifier 14→ 15→Fetch and classify all PR review feedback for the current branch's PR. 16→ 17→## Arguments 18→ 19→- `--pr <number>`: Target a specific PR by number (default: current branch's PR) 20→- `--include-resolved`: Include resolved threads (for reference) 21→ 22→Check `$ARGUMENTS` for flags. 23→ 24→## Critical Constraints 25→ 26→**DO NOT write Python scripts or any code files.** Classify the data using direct AI reasoning only. Writing code to process JSON is unnecessary and pollutes the filesystem. 27→ 28→## Steps 29→ 30→1. **Fetch PR info and all comments in a single call:**
... [194 lines omitted] ...
130→ "action_summary": "Bot suggestion: add unit tests for error handling paths", 132→ "original_comment": "Consider adding unit tests for the error handling paths in this endpoint" 170→ "error": null 184→## Error Case 198→ "error": "No PR found for branch feature-xyz" 216→ "error": null
session.assistant: Now I'll execute the command to fetch PR feedback for PR #8544:

session.assistant: Let me check the current branch configuration and try with a different base:
session.tool_result: f3fb7ca53 Address PR review: emphasize intelligent rebase in help string plan 8a35c094d Add plan: Plan: Document mid-rebase behavior for `erk pr rebase` b1c82a090 Sync CHANGELOG with recently-landed features and fixes (#8541) c261c6d98 Support external learned docs repository via config (#8534) 036715082 Implement session accumulation for cross-machine learning via preprocessed XML on git branches (#8511)
session.assistant: Let me try to get the diff with master or origin/main:

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: git diff --stat -M -C master...HEAD 2>/dev/null || git diff --stat -M -C origin/main...HEAD 2>/dev/null || git diff --stat -M -C HEAD~1...HEAD
Get file-level restructuring context with fallback

session.assistant:
Perfect! Now I have all the information needed. The PR #8544 has no review threads or discussion comments, which means there are no comments to classify. Let me output the complete JSON response:
```json { "success": true, "pr_number": 8544, "pr_title": "[erk-plan] Plan: Document mid-rebase behavior for `erk pr rebase`", "pr_url": "https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8544", "actionable_threads": [], "discussion_actions": [], "informational_count": 0, "batches": [ { "name": "Pre-Existing (Auto-Resolve)", "complexity": "pre_existing", "auto_proceed": true, "item_indices": [] }, { "name": "Local Fixes", "complexity": "local", "auto_proceed": true, "item_indices": [] }, { "name": "Single-File", "complexity": "single_file", "auto_proceed": true, "item_indices": [] }, { "name": "Cross-Cutting", "complexity": "cross_cutting", "auto_proceed": false, "item_indices": [] } ], "error": null } ```
